# sourceItem

**Instance Property**

A description of the item stored at the source.

## Declaration

```swift
var sourceItem: NSFileProviderItem { get }
```

## Accessing the Operation’s Data

- **targetSide**: The target location for the new item.
- **domainVersion**: The domain’s version when the system discovered the item at the source location.

items.description: The target location for the new item.
